title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo, former Twitter CEO, discusses prospects for SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs, including timing, strategic differences, capital sources, and risks specific to AI company valuations. The discussion covers how these IPOs differ from traditional tech company public offerings and explores whether AI firms constitute genuine platform businesses.
